summary: Iteration 76: Complete testing of NEW subscriber CRUD features for admin panel. All 16 backend API tests pass, all frontend features verified working.

tests.description: Create subscriber with full EMI schedule, sessions, programs
Create with existing email updates instead of duplicate
EMI payment with invalid client_id returns 404

details: 'Add Subscriber' button visible in Annual Subscribers tab header
Clicking opens inline form with all required fields
Form fields: Name*, Email, Annual Program, Start/End Date, Total Fee, Currency dropdown, Payment Mode dropdown, Number of EMIs
EMI schedule table appears when num_emis > 0 (with Due Date, Amount, Remaining, Status columns)
Sessions section with Carry Fwd, Current, Total, Availed, Yet to Avail, Due fields
Add Scheduled Date with date picker and + button
Programs in Package with text input and + button, shows tags
Create Subscriber and Cancel buttons
Edit button (pencil icon) visible on each subscriber row
Clicking opens form pre-filled with existing data
Priya Sharma edit form shows: name, email, program 'Quad Layer Healing - Annual', dates, fee 50000 INR, 6 EMIs with schedule
Sessions pre-filled: Carry Fwd (2), Current (12), Total (14), Availed (5), Yet to Avail (9), Due (1)
Programs: Quad Layer Healing, AWRP, SoulSync NeuroHarmonics, Trauma Clearing
Update Subscriber and Cancel buttons
Clicking subscriber name expands row to show details
EMI Schedule section with table showing #, Due, Amt, Rem, Status
Green checkmark button (data-testid='mark-emi-paid-{number}') on unpaid EMIs
Sessions & Programs section with stats cards
'Mark +1 Session Availed' button (data-testid='increment-session-{id}')
Programs displayed as purple tags
Scheduled dates displayed as amber tags
Page at /dashboard/financials loads correctly
'Sacred Exchange' header with subtitle
Top stats: Total Fee (INR 50,000), Paid (INR 18,000), Remaining (INR 32,000), Next Due (2026-05-27)
Payment Progress bar at 36% with '2/6 EMIs Paid'
EMI Schedule table with status badges (paid/due/pending)
Session Tracking ring chart (5 of 14)
Session breakdown cards, Bi-Annual/Quarterly stats
Upcoming Scheduled Sessions with dates
Newsletter 'Subscribers' tab exists separately from 'Annual Subscribers'
Programs tab loads correctly
Admin login works

seed_data_creation: Test subscribers created via backend tests (prefixed with TEST_) are automatically cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 tested the NEW subscriber CRUD features: POST /create, PUT /update/{id}, POST /emi-payment, POST /session-update, DELETE /delete/{id}. All endpoints work correctly. Frontend Add/Edit forms work with all fields including EMI schedule generator, sessions, programs. Quick actions (Mark EMI Paid, +1 Session) work from expanded subscriber row. Test user Priya Sharma has 6 EMIs, 14 sessions, 4 programs for testing.
